recommendations.title: Counterattack
recommendations.overview: When a hostage rescue mission creates a new enemy, Capt. Guerrero and his elite soldiers must face an ambush by a criminal group.

recommendations.title: MexZombies
recommendations.overview: A group of teenagers must face a zombie apocalypse, and help reestablish order.

recommendations.title: Mirreyes contra Godínez 2: El retiro
recommendations.overview: A divided team heads to a corporate retreat after receiving an enticing proposal. During their time away, they must overcome their differences and find a way to reunite.

recommendations.title: Our Times
recommendations.overview: Husband and wife Nora and Héctor's scientific breakthrough lets them time travel from 1966 to 2025. As Héctor struggles, Nora thrives—but at what cost?

recommendations.title: High and Low
recommendations.overview: A Yokohama shoe executive faces a wrenching choice when kidnappers mistakenly seize his chauffeur’s son but demand the ransom anyway.

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: Carrossel: O Filme
recommendations.overview: A group of friends finds their fun at vacation camp ruined when a big corporate developer threatens to build a pollution-spewing factory on the land.

recommendations.title: Project Almanac
recommendations.overview: A group of teens discover secret plans of a time machine, and construct one. However, things start to get out of control.

recommendations.title: The Tree of Wooden Clogs
recommendations.overview: On a turn-of-the-20th-century northern Italian farm, a group of sharecroppers eke out a threadbare existence. A priest advises Batisti and his wife Batistina that their young son Minec should be formally educated, so they sacrifice his help in the fi

recommendations.title: Toc Toc
recommendations.overview: A group of patients meet at a prestigious psychologist's office. Apart from the day and time of the appointment, something else unites them all: all six suffer from OCD. But the plane bringing the doctor is unexpectedly delayed, which forces them to
